PENNSYLVANIA CONVENTION CENTER AUTHORITY
LICENSE AGREEMENT

This License Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between the Pennsylvania
Convention Center Authority ("Licensor") and the American Kennel Club Association
("Licensee") for use of the Pennsylvania Convention Center facilities.

ARTICLE 1 - PREMISES
Licensor grants Licensee use of Hall A, Hall B, and associated meeting rooms
for September 3-7, 2026. Setup begins September 3; event days September 4-6;
teardown September 7.

ARTICLE 2 - FEES
Base license fee: $125,000 for the event period.
Additional charges apply for electrical, telecommunications, and cleaning services.
Payment schedule: 50% deposit due upon execution, balance due 30 days prior to event.

ARTICLE 3 - INSURANCE
Licensee shall provide certificates of insurance no later than June 1, 2026,
evidencing commercial general liability coverage of not less than $1,000,000
per occurrence and $5,000,000 aggregate.

ARTICLE 4 - EXCLUSIVE SERVICES
All catering services within the premises shall be provided exclusively by
Aramark Sports & Entertainment Services, LLC, the designated exclusive caterer.
No outside food or beverage may be brought into the facility without prior
written approval from the Licensor.

ARTICLE 5 - LABOR
All rigging, electrical, plumbing, HVAC, and freight handling within the
facility must be performed by union labor per applicable collective bargaining
agreements. Licensee is responsible for all associated labor costs.

ARTICLE 12 - FORCE MAJEURE
Neither party shall be liable for failure to perform its obligations under this
Agreement if such failure results from circumstances beyond its reasonable
control, including but not limited to acts of God, government action, pandemic,
or natural disaster.
